items.title: Social Media Manager
items.summary: Own LARIAL LTD's social presence end-to-end — build a content engine that turns CAC compliance into clear, useful, on-brand storytelling for Nigerians at home and abroad.
responsibilities: Plan and publish a weekly content calendar across Instagram, X, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook, and WhatsApp Status
Write short-form copy, captions, and hooks that explain CAC services in plain language
Produce or commission lightweight graphics, reels, and short-form video (Canva / CapCut level)
Run community management — DMs, comments, replies — and route serious leads to WhatsApp
Track engagement and follower growth; report what's working and iterate monthly
Coordinate with Ops/Compliance to turn real client wins into shareable case studies
requirements: 1+ year managing brand social accounts (agency or in-house)
Strong written communication in English; Pidgin a plus
Comfortable with Canva, CapCut, and at least one scheduling tool (Meta Business Suite, Buffer, or similar)
Eye for clean, modern, on-brand visuals
Self-starter who can ship without micromanagement
Bonus: familiarity with CAC / SME / fintech audiences in Nigeria
